overall.description: A cinematic walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, following a character through tree-lined pedestrian walkways, across neon-lit intersections, and beneath towering skyscrapers with massive digital billboards. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon signage in this clearly game-engine rendered environment reminiscent of Cyberpunk 2077's Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined pedestrian walkway with neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered pedestrian walkway lined with trees and neon signs, following a path toward an intersection

notable_agents.action: character in white jacket and blue pants walking ahead on the pedestrian path

entered.detail: dense overhead tree cover creating a natural canopy above the walkway
purple neon sign with Japanese text reading 'AYAME' on building facade
bright purple and blue neon sign with 'CIRCUIT' text
wet reflective tiled pavement with yellow curbs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered pedestrian walkway at night, with dense tree canopy overhead and vibrant neon signs reflecting off wet pavement. The camera follows a character in a white jacket walking ahead through this semi-enclosed urban garden space, passing by the 'AYAME' and 'CIRCUIT' storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection with large vertical billboard

events.description: exits tree-covered walkway into open intersection with view of towering skyscrapers
futuristic black vehicle drives past on the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: following the character across the intersection while approaching a massive vertical digital billboard

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car with glowing elements driving through the intersection

entered.detail: massive vertical digital screen displaying car advertisement with '37.7%' text and Japanese characters
green futuristic car parked or moving slowly near the curb
yellow and red striped construction barrier blocking part of the street

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the enclosed walkway to a wide-open futuristic intersection dominated by a massive vertical digital billboard advertising a vehicle. The camera follows the character across the wet asphalt as futuristic cars pass by, with the tree canopy giving way to towering glass skyscrapers and neon-lit facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with towering neon-lit skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal towering skyscrapers converging overhead with yellow structural beams
white futuristic sedan drives past from right to left

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the towering architecture while standing near the street, then continuing forward

entered.detail: massive yellow and black structural bridge connecting skyscrapers high overhead
elevated pedestrian or traffic bridge with glass sides spanning between buildings
large industrial ventilation fans mounted on building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to emphasize the dizzying height of the surrounding skyscrapers, revealing a massive yellow structural bridge connecting towers overhead. The environment shifts to a dense urban canyon with industrial ventilation units on building facades and elevated walkways, while futuristic vehicles pass by on the street below.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street underpass with multiple overhead digital billboards

events.description: enters covered underpass area beneath overhead bridge structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath the overpass, passing under multiple layers of digital signage

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking in opposite direction crossing the frame

entered.detail: dark tunnel-like underpass with overhead covering creating a corridor effect
multiple stacked digital screens displaying 'CIRCUIT' and other advertisements overhead
digital billboard showing 'NARCOS' text and character imagery
yellow-lit building entrance with glass doors on the left side

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into a covered underpass beneath the overhead bridge structure, where multiple layers of digital billboards including 'CIRCUIT' and 'NARCOS' advertisements create a canopy of light. The camera walks along the concrete sidewalk as a pedestrian passes by in the opposite direction, heading toward the darker tunnel entrance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban garden into the overwhelming scale of a neon-drenched cyberpunk metropolis. It begins on a covered pedestrian walkway, following a character in a white jacket past the Ayame and Circuit storefronts beneath a dense tree canopy and glowing signs. As the camera emerges from the greenery, the scene opens into a wide intersection where the trees give way to towering glass skyscrapers and a massive vertical billboard advertising a vehicle. The perspective then tilts upward to reveal a dizzying urban canyon dominated by a yellow structural bridge and industrial ventilation units before descending back to street level. Finally, the camera moves into a covered underpass beneath the bridge, passing through a canopy of Circuit and Narcos digital advertisements toward a dark tunnel entrance.
